con:part.con:content: <wsdl:definitions name="ConsultaPJeService-2.2.2" targetNamespace="http://ws.pje.cnj.jus.br/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:tns="http://ws.pje.cnj.jus.br/" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:ns1="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"> <wsdl:types> <xs:schema attributeFormDefault="unqualified" elementFormDefault="unqualified" targetNamespace="http://ws.pje.cnj.jus.br/" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:element name="consultarAssuntosJudiciais" type="tns:consultarAssuntosJudiciais"/> <xs:element name="consultarAssuntosJudiciaisCompletos" type="tns:consultarAssuntosJudiciaisCompletos"/> <xs:element name="consultarAssuntosJudiciaisCompletosResponse" type="tns:consultarAssuntosJudiciaisCompletosResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarAssuntosJudiciaisResponse" type="tns:consultarAssuntosJudiciaisResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarAtividadeEconomica" type="tns:consultarAtividadeEconomica"/> <xs:element name="consultarAtividadeEconomicaResponse" type="tns:consultarAtividadeEconomicaResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarClassesJudiciais" type="tns:consultarClassesJudiciais"/> <xs:element name="consultarClassesJudiciaisComSigla" type="tns:consultarClassesJudiciaisComSigla"/> <xs:element name="consultarClassesJudiciaisComSiglaResponse" type="tns:consultarClassesJudiciaisComSiglaResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarClassesJudiciaisResponse" type="tns:consultarClassesJudiciaisResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarCompetencias" type="tns:consultarCompetencias"/> <xs:element name="consultarCompetenciasResponse" type="tns:consultarCompetenciasResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarExpedientes" type="tns:consultarExpedientes"/> <xs:element name="consultarExpedientesResponse" type="tns:consultarExpedientesResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarJurisdicoes" type="tns:consultarJurisdicoes"/> <xs:element name="consultarJurisdicoesResponse" type="tns:consultarJurisdicoesResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarNaturezasCCLE" type="tns:consultarNaturezasCCLE"/> <xs:element name="consultarNaturezasCCLEResponse" type="tns:consultarNaturezasCCLEResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarOrgaosJulgadores" type="tns:consultarOrgaosJulgadores"/> <xs:element name="consultarOrgaosJulgadoresColegiados" type="tns:consultarOrgaosJulgadoresColegiados"/> <xs:element name="consultarOrgaosJulgadoresColegiadosResponse" type="tns:consultarOrgaosJulgadoresColegiadosResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarOrgaosJulgadoresCompleto" type="tns:consultarOrgaosJulgadoresCompleto"/> <xs:element name="consultarOrgaosJulgadoresCompletoResponse" type="tns:consultarOrgaosJulgadoresCompletoResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarOrgaosJulgadoresResponse" type="tns:consultarOrgaosJulgadoresResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarPrioridadesProcessuais" type="tns:consultarPrioridadesProcessuais"/> <xs:element name="consultarPrioridadesProcessuaisResponse" type="tns:consultarPrioridadesProcessuaisResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarSalasAudiencia" type="tns:consultarSalasAudienciaOrgaoJulgador"/> <xs:element name="consultarSalasAudienciaResponse" type="tns:consultarSalasAudienciaOrgaoJulgadorResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarTiposAudiencia" type="tns:consultarTiposAudiencia"/> <xs:element name="consultarTiposAudienciaResponse" type="tns:consultarTiposAudienciaResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarTiposDocumentoProcessual" type="tns:consultarTiposDocumentoProcessual"/> <xs:element name="consultarTiposDocumentoProcessualCompleto" type="tns:consultarTiposDocumentoProcessualCompleto"/> <xs:element name="consultarTiposDocumentoProcessualCompletoResponse" type="tns:consultarTiposDocumentoProcessualCompletoResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarTiposDocumentoProcessualResponse" type="tns:consultarTiposDocumentoProcessualResponse"/> <xs:element name="recuperarInformacoesFluxo" type="tns:recuperarInformacoesFluxo"/> <xs:element name="recuperarInformacoesFluxoResponse" type="tns:recuperarInformacoesFluxoResponse"/> <xs:complexType name="consultarClassesJudiciais"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="arg0" type="tns:jurisdicao"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="jurisdicao"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="descricao" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="id" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarClassesJudiciaisResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:classeJudicial"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="classeJudicial"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="codigo" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="descricao" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarJurisdicoes"> <xs:sequence/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarJurisdicoesResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:jurisdicao"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarOrgaosJulgadoresCompleto"> <xs:sequence/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarOrgaosJulgadoresCompletoResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:orgaoJulgadorCompleto"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="orgaoJulgadorCompleto"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="codigoCNJOrgao" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="id" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="nomeOrgao" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="instancia" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="codigoMunicipioIBGE" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarExpedientes"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="numeroProcesso" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="numeroInstanciaJudicial" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarExpedientesResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:expediente"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="expediente"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="outrosParametros" nillable="true" type="tns:tipoParametro"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="dataCriacao" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="dataCiencia" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="pessoaCiencia" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="dataFimPrazoLegal" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="uuidDocumento" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="pessoa" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> <xs:attribute name="idExpediente" type="xs:integer"/> <xs:attribute name="nomePessoaParte" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="tipoExpediente" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="meioExpediente" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="prazoLegal" type="xs:integer"/> <xs:attribute name="isFechado" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:attribute name="isPendenteManifestacao" type="xs:boolean"/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoParametro"> <xs:sequence/> <xs:attribute name="nome" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="valor" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="value" type="xs:string"/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarTiposAudiencia"> <xs:sequence/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarTiposAudienciaResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:tipoAudiencia"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoAudiencia"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="descricao" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="id" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="recuperarInformacoesFluxo"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="arg0" type="tns:classeJudicial"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="recuperarInformacoesFluxoResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:fluxo"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="fluxo"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="codClasseJudicial" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="id" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="xml" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarPrioridadesProcessuais"> <xs:sequence/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarPrioridadesProcessuaisResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:prioridadeProcessual"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="prioridadeProcessual"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ativo" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element name="idPrioridadeProcesso" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="motivo" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="prioridade" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="valorIdadeMaxima" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="valorIdadeMinima" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="valorPeso" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarNaturezasCCLE"> <xs:sequence/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarNaturezasCCLEResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:tipoNaturezaCCLE"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoNaturezaCCLE"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="idNaturezaClet" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="tipoNatureza" type="tns:tipoNaturezaCletEnum"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="dsNatureza" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarSalasAudienciaOrgaoJulgador"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="orgaoJulgador" type="tns:orgaoJulgador"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="orgaoJulgador"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="descricao" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="id" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="cargosJudiciais" nillable="true" type="tns:cargoJudicial"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="cargoJudicial"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="id" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="descricao" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarSalasAudienciaOrgaoJulgadorResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:salaAudiencia"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="salaAudiencia"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="id" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ignoraFeriado" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="nome" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="orgaoJulgador" type="tns:orgaoJulgador"/> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="salaHorarioList" nillable="true" type="tns:salaHorario"/> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="tipoAudienciaList" nillable="true" type="tns:tipoAudiencia"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="tipoSala" type="tns:salaEnum"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="salaHorario"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="diaSemama" type="tns:diaSemanaEnum"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="horaFinal" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="horaInicial" type="xs:dateTime"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarTiposDocumentoProcessual"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="arg0" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarTiposDocumentoProcessualResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:tipoDocumentoProcessual"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoDocumentoProcessual"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="codigo" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="descricao" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarClassesJudiciaisComSigla"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="arg0" type="tns:jurisdicao"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarClassesJudiciaisComSiglaResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:classeJudicialComSigla"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="classeJudicialComSigla"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="codigo" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="descricao" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="sigla" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarOrgaosJulgadores"> <xs:sequence/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarOrgaosJulgadoresResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:orgaoJulgador"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarAtividadeEconomica"> <xs:sequence/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarAtividadeEconomicaResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:atividadeEconomicaCompleto"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="atividadeEconomicaCompleto"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="atividadeEconomicaPai" type="tns:atividadeEconomicaCompleto"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ativo" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="dataAtualizacao" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element name="idAtividadeEconomica" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="nomeAtividadeEconomica" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarAssuntosJudiciaisCompletos"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="arg0" type="tns:jurisdicao"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="arg1" type="tns:classeJudicial"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarAssuntosJudiciaisCompletosResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:assuntoJudicialCompleto"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="assuntoJudicialCompleto"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="assunto" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="assuntoCompleto" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="assuntoSuperior" type="tns:assuntoJudicialCompleto"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ativo" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="codAssunto" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="codAssuntoOutro" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="glossario" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="tituloCodigoAssunto" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarTiposDocumentoProcessualCompleto"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="arg0" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarTiposDocumentoProcessualCompletoResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:tipoDocumentoProcessualCompleto"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoDocumentoProcessualCompleto"> <xs:complexContent> <xs:extension base="tns:tipoDocumentoProcessual"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="instancia" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="principalInterlocutoria" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="anexoInterlocutoria" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="principalInicial" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="anexoInicial" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:extension> </xs:complexContent> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarAssuntosJudiciais"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="arg0" type="tns:jurisdicao"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="arg1" type="tns:classeJudicial"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarAssuntosJudiciaisResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:assuntoJudicial"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="assuntoJudicial"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="codigo" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="descricao" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarEntidadesProcuradoria"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="usuario" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="orgaoCooperacao" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarEntidadesProcuradoriaResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="retorno" type="tns:entidade"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="entidade"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="id" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="nome" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarOrgaosJulgadoresColegiados"> <xs:sequence/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarOrgaosJulgadoresColegiadosResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:orgaoJulgadorColegiado"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="orgaoJulgadorColegiado"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="descricao" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="id" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarCompetencias"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="arg0" type="tns:jurisdicao"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="arg1" type="tns:classeJudicial"/> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="arg2" nillable="true" type="tns:assuntoJudicial"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarCompetenciasResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:competencia"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="competencia"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="descricao" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="id" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:simpleType name="tipoNaturezaCletEnum"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="C"/> <xs:enumeration value="E"/> <xs:enumeration value="L"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="diaSemanaEnum"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="DOMINGO"/> <xs:enumeration value="SEGUNDA"/> <xs:enumeration value="TERCA"/> <xs:enumeration value="QUARTA"/> <xs:enumeration value="QUINTA"/> <xs:enumeration value="SEXTA"/> <xs:enumeration value="SABADO"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="salaEnum"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="A"/> <xs:enumeration value="S"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:element name="PJeBusinessException" type="tns:PJeBusinessException"/> <xs:complexType name="PJeBusinessException"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="localizedMessage" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="code" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="params" type="xs:anyType"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="message" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="consultarEntidadesProcuradoria" nillable="true" type="tns:consultarEntidadesProcuradoria"/> <xs:element name="consultarEntidadesProcuradoriaResponse" nillable="true" type="tns:consultarEntidadesProcuradoriaResponse"/> </xs:schema> </wsdl:types> <wsdl:message name="consultarJurisdicoes"> <wsdl:part element="tns:consultarJurisdicoes" name="parameters"></wsdl:part>
